data.description:
## Incident Overview
test-artifact-update-integration.sh test_before_after_stale_update_cycle fails.

**Condition:** After dso-setup.sh creates host project and update-artifacts.sh updates the stale shim, the second run of check-artifact-versions.sh still outputs 'DSO artifacts out of date — stale: config (.claude/dso-config.conf)'.

**Observed:** FAIL: second check produces no output — actual: 'DSO artifacts out of date — stale: config (.claude/dso-config.conf). Run: dso update-artifacts'

**Expected:** Empty output (all artifacts current after update).

Likely cause: update-artifacts.sh skips the config update ('Config already current') when the config stamp matches plugin version, but check-artifact-versions.sh compares against a different version source.
data.title: [update-artifacts]: check-artifact-versions still flags dso-config.conf stale after update-artifacts.sh runs -> test_before_after_stale_update_cycle FAIL
